phrase: Show all evidence in Lane A (Custody)
description: Display all evidence nodes assigned to the custody lane
cypher: MATCH (e:Evidence)-[:EVIDENCE_IN_LANE]->(l:Lane {lane_id: 'A'}) RETURN e, l LIMIT 200

phrase: Show all evidence in Lane B (Housing)
description: Display all evidence nodes assigned to the Shady Oaks housing lane
cypher: MATCH (e:Evidence)-[:EVIDENCE_IN_LANE]->(l:Lane {lane_id: 'B'}) RETURN e, l LIMIT 200

phrase: Show all evidence in Lane D (PPO)
description: Display all evidence related to PPO / Protection Orders
cypher: MATCH (e:Evidence)-[:EVIDENCE_IN_LANE]->(l:Lane {lane_id: 'D'}) RETURN e, l LIMIT 200

phrase: Show all evidence in Lane E (Misconduct)
description: Display all evidence related to judicial misconduct
cypher: MATCH (e:Evidence)-[:EVIDENCE_IN_LANE]->(l:Lane {lane_id: 'E'}) RETURN e, l LIMIT 200

description: Show all violations committed by Judge McNeill with the rules violated
cypher:
MATCH (v:Violation)-[:COMMITTED_BY]->(j:Judge {name: 'Hon. Jenny L. McNeill'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (v)-[:VIOLATES_RULE]->(r:Rule)
RETURN v, j, r

description: Show only critical severity violations by Judge McNeill
cypher:
MATCH (v:Violation {severity: 'Critical'})-[:COMMITTED_BY]->(j:Judge {name: 'Hon. Jenny L. McNeill'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (v)-[:VIOLATES_RULE]->(r:Rule)
RETURN v, j, r

description: Show filings with readiness score above 70, sorted by readiness
cypher:
MATCH (f:Filing)
WHERE f.readiness_score > 70
OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:FILED_IN_CASE]->(c:Case)
RETURN f, c
ORDER BY f.readiness_score DESC

description: Show filings that need the most work (readiness below 30)
cypher:
MATCH (f:Filing)
WHERE f.readiness_score < 30
OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:FILED_IN_CASE]->(c:Case)
RETURN f, c
ORDER BY f.readiness_score ASC

description: Show MCR 2.003 and all co-cited authorities for disqualification motions
cypher:
MATCH (r1:Rule {citation: 'MCR 2.003'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (r1)-[:CO_CITED_WITH]-(r2:Rule)
OPTIONAL MATCH (f:Filing)-[:CITES_AUTHORITY]->(r1)
RETURN r1, r2, f

description: Show MCR 3.206 and related custody authorities
cypher:
MATCH (r1:Rule {citation: 'MCR 3.206'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (r1)-[:CO_CITED_WITH]-(r2:Rule)
OPTIONAL MATCH (f:Filing)-[:CITES_AUTHORITY]->(r1)
RETURN r1, r2, f

description: Show all evidence nodes that support claims with their relevance scores
cypher:
MATCH (e:Evidence)-[r:SUPPORTS_CLAIM]->(cl:Claim)
WHERE r.relevance_score > 0.7
RETURN e, r, cl
ORDER BY r.relevance_score DESC
LIMIT 100

phrase: Full case graph — Lane A nucleus
description: Show the complete Lane A subgraph with all connected nodes
cypher:
MATCH (l:Lane {lane_id: 'A'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (c:Case)-[:BELONGS_TO_LANE]->(l)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e:Evidence)-[:EVIDENCE_IN_LANE]->(l)
OPTIONAL MATCH (f:Filing)-[:FILED_IN_CASE]->(c)
OPTIONAL MATCH (ev:Event)-[:OCCURRED_ON]->(l)
RETURN l, c, e, f, ev
LIMIT 300

phrase: Full case graph — Lane E nucleus
description: Show the complete Lane E (Misconduct) subgraph
cypher:
MATCH (l:Lane {lane_id: 'E'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (c:Case)-[:BELONGS_TO_LANE]->(l)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e:Evidence)-[:EVIDENCE_IN_LANE]->(l)
OPTIONAL MATCH (v:Violation)-[cb:COMMITTED_BY]->(j:Judge)
OPTIONAL MATCH (ev:Event)-[:OCCURRED_ON]->(l)
RETURN l, c, e, v, j, ev
LIMIT 300

description: Show which SCAO forms are required by which filings
cypher:
MATCH (f:Filing)-[:REQUIRES_FORM]->(fm:Form)
RETURN f, fm
ORDER BY f.vehicle_name

description: Show all parties and the cases they are involved in
cypher:
MATCH (p:Party)-[r:PARTY_IN_CASE]->(c:Case)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Attorney)-[:ATTORNEY_REPRESENTS]->(p)
RETURN p, r, c, a

phrase: Evidence to filing chain — exhibit bindings
description: Show which evidence is used by which filings via exhibit bindings
cypher:
MATCH (f:Filing)-[r:FILING_USES_EVIDENCE]->(e:Evidence)
RETURN f, r, e
ORDER BY f.vehicle_name
LIMIT 200

description: Show all events ordered by date across all lanes
cypher:
MATCH (ev:Event)-[:OCCURRED_ON]->(l:Lane)
RETURN ev, l
ORDER BY ev.event_date DESC
LIMIT 100

description: Show custody lane events in chronological order
cypher:
MATCH (ev:Event)-[:OCCURRED_ON]->(l:Lane {lane_id: 'A'})
RETURN ev, l
ORDER BY ev.event_date DESC
LIMIT 100

description: Show rules with the most filing citations — the legal backbone
cypher:
MATCH (r:Rule)<-[:CITES_AUTHORITY]-(f:Filing)
WITH r, count(f) AS citation_count, collect(f.vehicle_name) AS filings
WHERE citation_count > 1
RETURN r, citation_count, filings
ORDER BY citation_count DESC
LIMIT 20

description: Show rules that are frequently cited together
cypher:
MATCH (r1:Rule)-[cc:CO_CITED_WITH]->(r2:Rule)
WHERE cc.co_citation_count > 1
RETURN r1, cc, r2
ORDER BY cc.co_citation_count DESC
LIMIT 50

description: Show the strongest evidence across all lanes
cypher:
MATCH (e:Evidence)
WHERE e.relevance_score > 0.8
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:EVIDENCE_IN_LANE]->(l:Lane)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:SUPPORTS_CLAIM]->(cl:Claim)
RETURN e, l, cl
ORDER BY e.relevance_score DESC
LIMIT 100

description: Show all witnesses and the evidence they testified about
cypher:
MATCH (w:Witness)-[r:TESTIFIED_ABOUT]->(e:Evidence)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:EVIDENCE_IN_LANE]->(l:Lane)
RETURN w, r, e, l
LIMIT 100

description: Show the full chain from filings citing rules that have been violated
cypher:
MATCH (f:Filing)-[:CITES_AUTHORITY]->(r:Rule)<-[:VIOLATES_RULE]-(v:Violation)
RETURN f, r, v
LIMIT 50

description: Find evidence not yet linked to any claim or filing
cypher:
MATCH (e:Evidence)
WHERE NOT (e)-[:SUPPORTS_CLAIM]->() AND NOT (e)<-[:FILING_USES_EVIDENCE]-()
RETURN e
ORDER BY e.relevance_score DESC
LIMIT 100

description: Find the most connected nodes across the entire graph
cypher:
MATCH (n)
WITH n, labels(n)[0] AS label, size([(n)--() | 1]) AS degree
WHERE degree > 5
RETURN n, label, degree
ORDER BY degree DESC
LIMIT 25

description: Count evidence per lane to identify coverage gaps
cypher:
MATCH (l:Lane)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e:Evidence)-[:EVIDENCE_IN_LANE]->(l)
RETURN l.lane_id AS lane, l.name AS name, count(e) AS evidence_count
ORDER BY l.lane_id

description: Show violation counts grouped by severity
cypher:
MATCH (v:Violation)
RETURN v.severity AS severity, count(v) AS count
ORDER BY CASE v.severity
  WHEN 'Critical' THEN 1
  WHEN 'High' THEN 2
  WHEN 'Medium' THEN 3
  WHEN 'Low' THEN 4
  ELSE 5
END

description: Show Lane D evidence and violations related to PPO weaponization
cypher:
MATCH (e:Evidence)-[:EVIDENCE_IN_LANE]->(l:Lane {lane_id: 'D'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:SUPPORTS_CLAIM]->(cl:Claim)
OPTIONAL MATCH (v:Violation)-[:VIOLATES_RULE]->(r:Rule)
WHERE v.violation_type CONTAINS 'PPO' OR v.violation_type CONTAINS 'protection'
RETURN e, l, cl, v, r
LIMIT 100

description: Show Lane B evidence, filings, and claims for housing dispute
cypher:
MATCH (l:Lane {lane_id: 'B'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (c:Case)-[:BELONGS_TO_LANE]->(l)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e:Evidence)-[:EVIDENCE_IN_LANE]->(l)
OPTIONAL MATCH (f:Filing)-[:FILED_IN_CASE]->(c)
OPTIONAL MATCH (cl:Claim {lane: 'B'})
RETURN l, c, e, f, cl
LIMIT 200

description: Show the full graph nucleus with lanes, cases, and key connections
cypher:
MATCH (l:Lane)
OPTIONAL MATCH (c:Case)-[:BELONGS_TO_LANE]->(l)
OPTIONAL MATCH (j:Judge)-[:JUDGE_PRESIDES]->(c)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p:Party)-[:PARTY_IN_CASE]->(c)
RETURN l, c, j, p
